text:
Quant City (, Kuwanto-shi) is a city within the Republic of Rokario. 

Overview

The city of Quant is a city that's located in the Republic of Rokario, close to the Bilgai Desert. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

The location of Quant City appears on Killua's Beatle-07 map. 

Translations around the World

Trivia

Quant City does not appear in the 2011 anime adaptation.
